chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln. No.566 of 2025. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For Hearing of Bail Application. 26.03.2025. Ms. Farzana Mateen, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sarfraz Ali Mangi, Spl. Prosecutor ANF. ************ After arguing at length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that she is not pressing the instant bail application if the trial Court may be directed to expedite the matter and conclude the same preferably within Thirty days. Such proposal is not opposed by learned Special Prosecutor ANF. In view of the above, the instant Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to expedite the matter and conclude the same preferably within Sixty days. It is made clear that if the witnesses do not attend the Court then trial Court shall take all coercive measures to procure the attendance of the witnesses and proceed with the matter on day to day basis and submit such compliance report to this Court through MIT-II. JUDGE Manthar Brohi
